response.justification: Sarah is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented senior developer with genuine systems experience (low-latency DLang services at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second), but she falls well short of the core requirement of 8 years of C++ — her documented C++ work amounts to roughly a year at National Instruments plus a thesis project. Her recent decade has centered on TypeScript/Node.js product work and full-stack development rather than large-scale compute infrastructure, and her leadership evidence is teaching/workshop-based rather than formal technical leadership of cloud or platform teams.
strengths: Real low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic
Strong engineering-practice foundation: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling author
Broad polyglot background with some cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployments)
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement; primary systems language is DLang, not C++
No sustained large-scale cloud compute platform or infrastructure ownership; mostly product/full-stack roles
No formal technical-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers; leadership evidence is workshops and side projects
